Ivandyr's Hoop  
 

Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: 6
AC: 6
WIS: +6 INT: +6 HP: +6
Effect: Spirit Tap (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except DRU MNK BRD BST
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HIE DWF HFL VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Ivandyr's Hoop
Lore Item
Slot: EAR
Charges: 6
AC: 6
WIS: +6 INT: +6 HP: +6
Effect: Spirit Tap (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except DRU MNK BRD BST
Race: ALL except BAR ELF HIE DWF HFL VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:80 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1496
Submitted By:Stugg
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 05:13:28
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 25,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 20
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Lynuga's Gem Collection

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Innothule Swamp


Uploaded January 6th, 2023 by iventheassassin

# Nov 13 2004 at 8:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257782701
8 posts
It's been asked 5 times through this whole thing but yet to be answered... How do you recharge it?? and to sum up for everyone else on PvP not there don't waste your loot, on non-PvP rangers rejoice!!!
▲ Page top
recharge?
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2003 at 8:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1621815620291
View User Forum
Scholar
45 posts
so, I take it no one knows if this item is rechargeable... ppl have asked a couple times already, but only replies I see is everyone bragging about how they got one and who can or can't use it instead of looking at the item description. Anyone got the 411 if this can be recharged?
▲ Page top
RE: recharge?
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2003 at 3:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257736291
Scholar
38 posts
from information i got ingame any item can be recharged by gnome tinkerers.. if they put the item and a mana battery ( the size depends on the item ) into a toolbox and combine it recharges the item. I cant cnfirm this as i havent tried it but hope this helps
▲ Page top
RE: recharge?
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2005 at 6:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
Not true. Only the PoSky quest items, and a small number of Tinkered items, can be recharged in this way. MOST Charged items in the game, like this one, are NOT rechargeable.
▲ Page top
RE: recharge?
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2003 at 3:40 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591775015891
35 posts
You can recharge any item.....As long as you sell or a vendor has bought a fully charged item. Then you sell the item that is out of charges to the vendor. And buy back the items and it will be fully charged. 1 Sell fully charged. 2 Sell uncharged. 3 buy em both back and they will both be charged. 4 make sure you have not sold the uncharged one in first. or they will both be uncharged. 5 you will need a mule for lore items or a compadre.

P.S. I said charged alot

Edited, Fri Aug 22 16:38:42 2003
▲ Page top
RE: recharge?
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2004 at 9:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758959177
54 posts
It is no longer possible to have vendors recharge items for you...twas struck with the nerf bat.

1,074 posts

Making a feature less rewarding is a nerf.

# Apr 01 2003 at 12:06 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759939660
33 posts
"intended for """""races""""" that could be the evil classes" You need to learn to read, and comprehend. There is a diference between EVIL RACES ( hated almost every where ) and evil CLASSES ( tolorated for the most part by there own Race)

Humans can be Shadowknights ( evil ), or Necromancers ( evil )
Erudites SAME
Gnome - Necromancers

This leaves out why High Elfs are allowed.

However if it was bassed on one of the DARK religions then They fit. There wizards can worship Solsek Ro

# Oct 12 2002 at 2:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249269837

Just a couple words about who can use this item and why. 1: Gnomes can use this. 2: Half-Elves can use this because they can worship Rallos Zek (an evil god). There, questions answered.
▲ Page top
Drop-Yes/Drop-No
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2002 at 9:58 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750302620
32 posts
It would seem to be that on the Zek servers, the success rate has been severely nerfed. But if you're on a non-Zek server, you still have the same chance. Or at least a better chance than on a Zek server. :-)
▲ Page top
RE: Drop-Yes/Drop-No
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 3:23 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
Ive heard ( not confirmed personally ) that this item was nerfed on all PvP servers due to the fact it had basically a 900 hp life tap effect that took less than 2 seconds to get off...so you walk up to that twinked out 60 wizard who just soloed some big mob and go up and click the earring 6 times and splat...LOADING PLEASE WAIT.. while you loot the sweetest item off his corpse. The got rid of it AFAIK, so Ivandyrs Hoops with all 6 charges on them on PVP servers that are left probably cost a fortune. Still a VERY nice earring for the effort on non PVP servers tho, especially as a shaman if all 900 hp ( 6 casts x 150hp/cast ) landed, the mob would be down 900 hp and you would have 900 more hp to cannibalize to make the kill or make your escape.
To answer the question, yes, its still drops on blue servers, and not on PvP servers due to it being overpowered for PvP.

56 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Baron Aggrok ( YEAHHH! made 56 finally last night !! )
▲ Page top
RE: Drop-Yes/Drop-No

# Mar 21 2003 at 11:07 AM Rating: Decent

6 insta-cast 150 dmg tap.
▲ Page top
Ivandyr's Hoops
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2002 at 3:50 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
I got one of these last night. I spawned Lynuga by killing everything that moved around Guk entry, including 2 of the Nobles. After about 30 min she spawned at pos 400, neg 482. I handed in gem 1 and got a hammer. the 2nd one gave me nothing--I assumed I got a hammer again and since they are lore It didnt go into inventory--so I ran and sold the hammer at the troll at the stone hand ( pos 1180, pos 540 ) and ran back to Lynuga. I did this until I ran out of gems and when I went back to Grobb to get more ( cant remember merchants name ), I got attacked by guards that werent KoS before. So I zoned back out and invised, ran back to the the merchant. One guard wouldnt leave the area, so I walked to a safe spot and cast root on him, which broke my invis and he came after me. After I had him rooted out of the way I got more gems and gated back to Lynuga. I got the loop and didnt spend as much as the market value in doing so ( around 4k on Luclin server ). Just keep in mind its best to have 2 people doing this, one to do the turn ins and one to sell the hammers/axes and buy more gems--the gems with 136 CHA in Grobb were 131pp and change, and the weapons sell for 70pp each roughly. You will waste troll basher faction but merchants will still deal with you if u need to buy the rubies in Grobb. Finally an upgrade to my Forrest Loops ( to bad IH's are lore ).
By the way, there is no truth to the stories that you have to hand in 4 rubies at a time to get the hoop or give them to her stacked--give her one at a time.

55 Ogre Luminary on Luclin Server--Chaotic Winds--Baron Aggrok

Edited, Sat Sep 21 16:37:27 2002

Just something else Ive noticed is that Dark Elf Necromancers seem to have had the best luck. 1 guy handed in 1 ruby and got it. I handed in 2 and got it.. hmm. Just a thought.
▲ Page top
RE: DE Necros
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2002 at 3:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776013048
View User Forum
263 posts
Twice is a coincidence. It takes at least three incidents to be a pattern, and many more to test the reliability of that pattern.

Got it
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 6:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778878092
17 posts
This is still dropping. I had 2 rubies on me and saw this gal. Gave her the 1st one and got the axe, gave her the 2nd and bingo! got the hoop.
I remembered reading these posts and equipt my opal encrusted stien which brought my charisma up to 75 (Dark Elf Necro :).. but then who can say if that had anything to do with it at all.
So, still dropping good luck all.

# Aug 08 2002 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent

1 post
I tried this quest today, and got the normal junk. I also got a message :'Mmm. Ruby!! Me thanks you! Here take this, me got it off dead someone who try take me collection. Me thinks this valuable thing.' I didn't get any item with this message other than faction and a little exp. Anybody know what this is?
▲ Page top
NERFED
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2002 at 12:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780059157
2 posts
as of the June 6 patch, this item was nerfed. It not longer drops, or has been put to a rate that is insane. I went there, and spent over 15 stacks of rubies for one of these. I wanted that effect to save my life, but found, i emptied my bank account. I got friends to try it, people will ally faction, everything. IMO the item has stopped dropping.. and it was such a nice item.
▲ Page top
RE: NERFED
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2002 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759449951
5 posts
I play on both Rallos Zek and Xegony. I have been looking into these hoops for a long period of time now. I decided to give it a shot. On Xegony, it took a while to find Lynuga up but I got the hoop on my 27th ruby. Rallos Zek, on the other hand, is a different story =(... I used over 275 rubies on this (&#$(&#. After about the 100th ruby my attitude was 'OK, I have gone this far... not going to quit now after putting so much money in...' So, being the rich guy I am, I have(errr HAD) over 125k so I figured I would be able to get it eventually, I used more and more rubies. Around the 200th ruby, I petitioned. I kept on going, and finally gave up when a GM began talking with me. Well, it is confirmed... due to it being overpowered PvP-wise, it has officially been nerfed *cry*.. I wasn't even wanting it for PvP reasons =(
▲ Page top
RE: NERFED
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2002 at 7:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759449951
5 posts
Just figured I'd add something, if you are on Rallos, and you are looking for one of those GODFORSAKENLY TOO COMMON (&#$(#*&$#& axes, then I would suggest doing this quest. Otherwise, do yourself a favor and keep those rubies... add it to your <I'm going to get a horse> fund.

RE: sorry
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2002 at 3:42 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777377142
129 posts
sorry to change the subject, but speaking of horses, how much do they cost? i have heard from a lot of people that they cost over 100,000 pp, but i just wanted to check the prices out of my own newb dreaming, and to my surprise they were less then 87,000pp. would faction have changed the price that much or is that there actual price? and yes, i was looking at the chain (best quality right?) horses
▲ Page top
RE: sorry
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2003 at 8:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362279460
View User Forum
66 posts
Where to buy a horse?
▲ Page top
RE: sorry
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2002 at 9:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
The cheapest horse is around 8k (with cha buffed). The really nice thing is that 8k gets you 90% of what is useful about a horse. The speed aspect is mostly a red-herring (get yourself 10 sow potions for 1k, and those should last you quite a while). The real benefit for casters is that you are effectively always sitting, but with no agro! I've heard horses described as FT 10 for this very reason!

A horse is going to be my next purchace... then some rubies :-)
▲ Page top
NOT Nerfed
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2002 at 3:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1668384989855
View User Forum
Scholar
18 posts
Saw Lynuga up, was carrying a lot of rubies I was using to make Mistletoe Sickles, and was feeling lucky (had just gotten a nifty new Vengeful Mistmoore Shield - thanks, Grongl!). I decided to drop some rubies on her. Gave her a single ruby - Brutechopper. Gave four more at once, got the mallet (and presumably lost three other items due to their being lore). Another set of four, and got the Hoop. Still feeling lucky, gave another character with me the rubies I had left, they turned in four - another Hoop! So two hoops for only 13 rubies.

Doesn't seem nerfed - just the vagaries of the much maligned RNG. Color me a very lucky (and happy) ogre.

Garshok
45 Shadowknight, Quellious

▲ Page top

# Apr 23 2002 at 11:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777856180
1 post
I obtained this ear hoop last night with my paladin. It dropped off of a mob called "Magicfeather" in North karana, was light blue to a lvl 51 paladin. He also dropped a combine war hammer and a jade ring. pretty hard mob to kill, magc resitance was high, he nuked and hit pretty hard

48 posts
Magicfeather was a short lived event type thing in NK a while back. I seem to recall something like this name a while back and a guildmate confirmed my suspicion. Kinda like the "swarm queen" in WK who was a short lived blue diamond dropping mob that was an easy kill for one 50+ back when the whole qeynos badge series started. I am still bitter that I never managed to waste that bug....

either way, congrats paladin person. Very nice earring.

Scholar
28 posts
Are you kiddin me, a ranger with spirit tap! This is by far my most favorite item in the game to date. Weapon proc's and Tolan stuff be damned. This little item has saved my *** every time Ive used it, and I will be sure always to have one with a charge left in it
